contentBlocks.original:
ॐ अस्य श्रीअर्गलास्तोत्रमन्त्रस्य विष्णुर्ऋषिः,अनुष्टुप् छन्दः,
श्रीमहालक्ष्मीर्देवता, श्रीजगदम्बाप्रीतये सप्तशतीपाठाङ्गत्वेन जपे विनियोगः॥
ॐ नमश्चण्डिकायै॥
मार्कण्डेय उवाच
contentBlocks.transliteration:
oṃ asya śrīargalāstotramantrasya viṣṇurṛṣiḥ,anuṣṭup chandaḥ,
śrīmahālakṣmīrdevatā, śrījagadambāprītaye saptaśatīpāṭhāṅgatvena jape viniyogaḥ..
oṃ namaścaṇḍikāyai..
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca
contentBlocks.translation: Oṃ, for the recitation of this Argala Stotram mantra, the seer (Rishi) is Viṣṇu, the meter (Chandaḥ) is Anuṣṭup, the deity (Devata) is Śrī Mahālakṣmī, and it is used in the ritual recitation of the Saptaśatī for pleasing Śrī Jagadambā.
contentBlocks.meanings: ॐ (oṃ) – sacred sound; अस्य (asya) – of this; श्रीअर्गलास्तोत्रमन्त्रस्य (śrīargalāstotramantrasya) – of the Śrī Argala Stotra mantra (śrī:auspicious | argalā:obstacle | stotra:hymn | mantrasya:of the mantra); विष्णुः (viṣṇuḥ) – Viṣṇu; ऋषिः (ṛṣiḥ) – seer; अनुष्टुप् (anuṣṭup) – Anuṣṭup meter; छन्दः (chandaḥ) – meter; श्रीमहालक्ष्मीः (śrīmahālakṣmīḥ) – Śrī Mahālakṣmī (śrī:auspicious | mahā:great | lakṣmī:goddess of wealth); देवता (devatā) – deity; श्रीजगदम्बाप्रीतये (śrījagadambāprītaye) – for pleasing Śrī Jagadambā (śrī:auspicious | jagadambā:mother of the universe | prītaye:for pleasing); सप्तशतीपाठाङ्गत्वेन (saptaśatīpāṭhāṅgatvena) – as part of Saptaśatī recitation (saptaśatī:seven hundred | pāṭha:recitation | aṅgatvena:as part); जपे (jape) – in the recitation; विनियोगः (viniyogaḥ) – application; ॐ (oṃ) – sacred sound; नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; चण्डिकायै (caṇḍikāyai) – to Caṇḍikā; मार्कण्डेय (mārkaṇḍeya) – Mārkaṇḍeya; उवाच (uvāca) – said;

contentBlocks.original:
ॐ जयन्ती मङ्गला काली भद्रकाली कपालिनी।
दुर्गा क्षमा शिवा धात्री स्वाहा स्वधा नमोऽस्तु ते॥1॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
oṃ jayantī maṅgalā kālī bhadrakālī kapālinī.
durgā kṣamā śivā dhātrī svāhā svadhā namo'stu te..1..
contentBlocks.translation: Salutations to you, O Goddess! You are Jayantī (the victorious), Maṅgalā (the auspicious), Kālī (the black-hued one), Bhadrakālī (the benevolent and fierce form of Kālī), and Kapālinī (the one who holds a skull). You are Durgā (the invincible), Kṣamā (the embodiment of forgiveness), Śivā (the auspicious one), Dhātrī (the support of all beings), Svāhā (the invocation for offerings to the gods), and Svadhā (the invocation for offerings to the ancestors). Salutations to you!
contentBlocks.meanings: ॐ (oṃ) – sacred sound; जयन्ती (jayantī) – victorious; मङ्गला (maṅgalā) – auspicious; काली (kālī) – black-hued one; भद्रकाली (bhadrakālī) – benevolent fierce Kālī (bhadra:benevolent | kālī:Kālī); कपालिनी (kapālinī) – holds a skull; दुर्गा (durgā) – invincible; क्षमा (kṣamā) – forgiveness; शिवा (śivā) – auspicious one; धात्री (dhātrī) – support of all beings; स्वाहा (svāhā) – invocation for gods; स्वधा (svadhā) – invocation for ancestors; नमोऽस्तु (namo'stu) – salutations to you (namaḥ:salutations | astu:to you); ते (te) – to you;

contentBlocks.original:
जय त्वं देवि चामुण्डे जय भूतार्तिहारिणि।
जय सर्वगते देवि कालरात्रि नमोऽस्तु ते॥2॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
jaya tvaṃ devi cāmuṇḍe jaya bhūtārtihāriṇi.
jaya sarvagate devi kālarātri namo'stu te..2..
contentBlocks.translation: Victory to you, O Goddess Cāmuṇḍā! Victory to you, the remover of the distress of beings! Victory to you, O all-pervading Goddess, O Kālarātri (night of destruction), salutations to you!
contentBlocks.meanings: जय (jaya) – victory; त्वं (tvaṃ) – you; देवि (devi) – O Goddess; चामुण्डे (cāmuṇḍe) – O Cāmuṇḍā; जय (jaya) – victory; भूतार्तिहारिणि (bhūtārtihāriṇi) – remover of distress of beings (bhūta:beings | ārtihāriṇi:remover of distress); जय (jaya) – victory; सर्वगते (sarvagate) – all-pervading (sarva:all | gate:pervading); देवि (devi) – O Goddess; कालरात्रि (kālarātri) – Kālarātri; नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; अस्तु (astu) – be; ते (te) – to you;

contentBlocks.original:
मधुकैटभविद्राविविधातृवरदे नमः।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥3॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
madhukaiṭabhavidrāvividhātṛvarade namaḥ.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..3..
contentBlocks.translation: Salutations to the one who bestowed boons after destroying the demons Madhuka and Kaiṭabha. Grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: मधुकैटभविद्राविविधातृवरदे (madhukaiṭabhavidrāvividhātṛvarade) – to the boon-giver who dispelled Madhuka and Kaiṭabha (madhukaiṭabha:Madhuka and Kaiṭabha | vidrāvi:dispelled | vidhātṛ:giver | varade:of boons); नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
महिषासुरनिर्णाशि भक्तानां सुखदे नमः।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥4॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mahiṣāsuranirṇāśi bhaktānāṃ sukhade namaḥ.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..4..
contentBlocks.translation: Salutations to the one who annihilated Mahishasura and who grants happiness to her devotees. Grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: महिषासुरनिर्णाशि (mahiṣāsuranirṇāśi) – annihilator of Mahishasura (mahiṣāsura:Mahishasura | nirṇāśi:annihilator); भक्तानां (bhaktānāṃ) – of the devotees; सुखदे (sukhade) – giver of happiness (sukha:happiness | de:giver); नमः (namaḥ) – salutations; रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
रक्तबीजवधे देवि चण्डमुण्डविनाशिनि।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥5॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
raktabījavadhe devi caṇḍamuṇḍavināśini.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..5..
contentBlocks.translation: O Goddess, the slayer of Raktabīja and the destroyer of Caṇḍa and Muṇḍa, grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: रक्तबीजवधे (raktabījavadhe) – slayer of Raktabīja (rakta:blood | bīja:seed | vadhe:slayer); देवि (devi) – O Goddess; चण्डमुण्डविनाशिनि (caṇḍamuṇḍavināśini) – destroyer of Caṇḍa and Muṇḍa (caṇḍa:Caṇḍa | muṇḍa:Muṇḍa | vināśini:destroyer); रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
शुम्भस्यैव निशुम्भस्य धूम्राक्षस्य च मर्दिनि।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥6॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śumbhasyaiva niśumbhasya dhūmrākṣasya ca mardini.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..6..
contentBlocks.translation: O destroyer of Śumbha, Niśumbha, and Dhūmrākṣa, grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: शुम्भस्य (śumbhasya) – of Śumbha; एव (eva) – indeed; निशुम्भस्य (niśumbhasya) – of Niśumbha; धूम्राक्षस्य (dhūmrākṣasya) – of Dhūmrākṣa; च (ca) – and; मर्दिनि (mardini) – O destroyer; रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषः (dviṣaḥ) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
वन्दिताङ्घ्रियुगे देवि सर्वसौभाग्यदायिनि।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥7॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vanditāṅghriyuge devi sarvasaubhāgyadāyini.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..7..
contentBlocks.translation: O Goddess, whose feet are worshipped and who bestows all auspiciousness, grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: वन्दिताङ्घ्रियुगे (vanditāṅghriyuge) – whose feet are worshipped (vandita:worshipped | aṅghriyuge:feet); देवि (devi) – O Goddess; सर्वसौभाग्यदायिनि (sarvasaubhāgyadāyini) – who bestows all auspiciousness (sarva:all | saubhāgya:auspiciousness | dāyini:bestower); रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
अचिन्त्यरुपचरिते सर्वशत्रुविनाशिनि।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥8॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
acintyarupacarite sarvaśatruvināśini.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..8..
contentBlocks.translation: O Goddess of incomprehensible form and deeds, destroyer of all enemies, grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: अचिन्त्यरुपचरिते (acintyarūpacarite) – of incomprehensible form and deeds (acintya:incomprehensible | rūpa:form | carite:and deeds); सर्वशत्रुविनाशिनि (sarvaśatruvināśini) – destroyer of all enemies (sarva:all | śatru:enemies | vināśini:destroyer); रुपं (rūpaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
नतेभ्यः सर्वदा भक्त्या चण्डिके दुरितापहे।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥9॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
natebhyaḥ sarvadā bhaktyā caṇḍike duritāpahe.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..9..
contentBlocks.translation: O Caṇḍikā, who is always worshipped with devotion and who removes suffering, grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: नतेभ्यः (natebhyaḥ) – to the bowed ones; सर्वदा (sarvadā) – always; भक्त्या (bhaktyā) – with devotion; चण्डिके (caṇḍike) – O Caṇḍikā; दुरितापहे (duritāpaha) – remover of suffering (durita:suffering | āpaha:remover); रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
स्तुवद्भ्यो भक्तिपूर्वं त्वां चण्डिके व्याधिनाशिनि।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥10॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
stuvadbhyo bhaktipūrvaṃ tvāṃ caṇḍike vyādhināśini.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..10..
contentBlocks.translation: O Caṇḍikā, destroyer of diseases, you are praised with full devotion. Grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: स्तुवद्भ्यः (stuvadbhyaḥ) – to those who praise; भक्तिपूर्वम् (bhaktipūrvam) – with full devotion (bhakti:devotion | pūrvam:with full); त्वाम् (tvām) – you; चण्डिके (caṇḍike) – O Caṇḍikā; व्याधिनाशिनि (vyādhināśini) – destroyer of diseases (vyādhi:diseases | nāśini:destroyer); रुपम् (rupam) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयम् (jayam) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशः (yaśaḥ) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषः (dviṣaḥ) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
चण्डिके सततं ये त्वामर्चयन्तीह भक्तितः।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥11॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
caṇḍike satataṃ ye tvāmarcayantīha bhaktitaḥ.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..11..
contentBlocks.translation: O Caṇḍikā, to those who constantly worship you with devotion, grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: चण्डिके (caṇḍike) – O Caṇḍikā; सततं (satataṃ) – constantly; ये (ye) – those who; त्वाम् (tvām) – you; अर्चयन्ति (arcayanti) – worship; इह (iha) – here; भक्तितः (bhaktitaḥ) – with devotion; रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशः (yaśaḥ) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषः (dviṣaḥ) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
देहि सौभाग्यमारोग्यं देहि मे परमं सुखम्।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥12॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dehi saubhāgyamārogyaṃ dehi me paramaṃ sukham.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..12..
contentBlocks.translation: Grant me good fortune and health, and bestow upon me supreme happiness. Grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: देहि (dehi) – grant; सौभाग्यम् (saubhāgyam) – good fortune; आरोग्यम् (ārogyam) – health; देहि (dehi) – grant; मे (me) – to me; परमम् (paramam) – supreme; सुखम् (sukham) – happiness; रुपम् (rupam) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयम् (jayam) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशः (yaśaḥ) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषः (dviṣaḥ) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
विधेहि द्विषतां नाशं विधेहि बलमुच्चकैः।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥13॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vidhehi dviṣatāṃ nāśaṃ vidhehi balamuccakaiḥ.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..13..
contentBlocks.translation: Bring about the destruction of my enemies and grant me great strength. Grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: विधेहि (vidhehi) – bring about; द्विषताम् (dviṣatām) – of enemies; नाशम् (nāśam) – destruction; विधेहि (vidhehi) – grant; बलम् (balam) – strength; उच्चकैः (uccakaiḥ) – greatly; रुपम् (rupam) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयम् (jayam) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशः (yaśaḥ) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषः (dviṣaḥ) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
विधेहि देवि कल्याणं विधेहि परमां श्रियम्।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥14॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vidhehi devi kalyāṇaṃ vidhehi paramāṃ śriyam.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..14..
contentBlocks.translation: O Goddess, grant me auspiciousness and bestow supreme prosperity. Grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: विधेहि (vidhehi) – grant; देवि (devi) – O Goddess; कल्याणं (kalyāṇam) – auspiciousness; विधेहि (vidhehi) – grant; परमां (paramām) – supreme; श्रियम् (śriyam) – prosperity; रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषः (dviṣaḥ) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
सुरासुरशिरोरत्ननिघृष्टचरणेऽम्बिके।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥15॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
surāsuraśiroratnanighṛṣṭacaraṇe'mbike.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..15..
contentBlocks.translation: O Mother, whose feet are adorned with the crowns of both gods and demons, grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: सुरासुरशिरोरत्ननिघृष्टचरणे (surāsuraśiroratnanighṛṣṭacaraṇe) – O one whose feet are rubbed (surā:gods | asura:demons | śiraḥ:heads | ratna:jewels | nighṛṣṭa:rubbed | caraṇe:feet); अम्बिके (ambike) – O Mother; रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
विद्यावन्तं यशस्वन्तं लक्ष्मीवन्तं जनं कुरु।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥16॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vidyāvantaṃ yaśasvantaṃ lakṣmīvantaṃ janaṃ kuru.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..16..
contentBlocks.translation: Make me learned, famous, and prosperous. Grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: विद्यावन्तं (vidyāvantaṃ) – learned (vidyā:knowledge | vantaṃ:possessing); यशस्वन्तं (yaśasvantaṃ) – famous (yaśas:fame | vantaṃ:possessing); लक्ष्मीवन्तं (lakṣmīvantaṃ) – prosperous (lakṣmī:wealth | vantaṃ:possessing); जनं (janaṃ) – person; कुरु (kuru) – make; रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
प्रचण्डदैत्यदर्पघ्ने चण्डिके प्रणताय मे।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥17॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
pracaṇḍadaityadarpaghne caṇḍike praṇatāya me.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..17..
contentBlocks.translation: O Caṇḍikā, destroyer of the arrogance of fierce demons, I bow to you. Grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: प्रचण्डदैत्यदर्पघ्ने (pracaṇḍadaityadarpaghne) – destroyer of demon arrogance (pracaṇḍa:fierce | daitya:demon | darpa:arrogance | ghne:destroyer); चण्डिके (caṇḍike) – O Caṇḍikā; प्रणताय (praṇatāya) – to the one who bows; मे (me) – to me; रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
चतुर्भुजे चतुर्वक्त्रसंस्तुते परमेश्वरि।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥18॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
caturbhuje caturvaktrasaṃstute parameśvari.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..18..
contentBlocks.translation: O supreme Goddess, praised in your form with four arms and four faces, grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: चतुर्भुजे (caturbhuje) – with four arms (catur:four | bhuje:arms); चतुर्वक्त्रसंस्तुते (caturvaktrasaṃstute) – praised with four faces (catur:four | vaktra:faces | saṃstute:praised); परमेश्वरि (parameśvari) – O supreme Goddess (parama:supreme | īśvari:Goddess); रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
कृष्णेन संस्तुते देवि शश्वद्भक्त्या सदाम्बिके।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥19॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kṛṣṇena saṃstute devi śaśvadbhaktyā sadāmbike.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..19..
contentBlocks.translation: O Goddess, constantly praised by Kṛṣṇa with devotion, O Mother, grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: कृष्णेन (kṛṣṇena) – by Kṛṣṇa; संस्तुते (saṃstute) – praised; देवि (devi) – O Goddess; शश्वद्भक्त्या (śaśvadbhaktyā) – with constant devotion (śaśvat:constant | bhaktyā:with devotion); सदाम्बिके (sadāmbike) – O Mother (sadā:always | ambike:O Mother); रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
हिमाचलसुतानाथसंस्तुते परमेश्वरि।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥20॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
himācalasutānāthasaṃstute parameśvari.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..20..
contentBlocks.translation: O supreme Goddess, praised by the Lord of the daughter of Himācala (Śiva), grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: हिमाचलसुतानाथसंस्तुते (himācalasutānāthasaṃstute) – praised by Śiva (himācala:Himācala | sutā:daughter | nātha:lord | saṃstute:praised by); परमेश्वरि (parameśvari) – O supreme Goddess (parama:supreme | īśvari:Goddess); रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
इन्द्राणीपतिसद्भावपूजिते परमेश्वरि।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥21॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
indrāṇīpatisadbhāvapūjite parameśvari.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..21..
contentBlocks.translation: O supreme Goddess, worshipped by Indrāṇī’s consort (Indra), grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: इन्द्राणीपतिसद्भावपूजिते (indrāṇīpatisadbhāvapūjite) – worshipped by Indrāṇī’s consort (indrāṇī:Indrāṇī | pati:consort | sadbhāva:good nature | pūjite:worshipped); परमेश्वरि (parameśvari) – O supreme Goddess; रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
देवि प्रचण्डदोर्दण्डदैत्यदर्पविनाशिनि।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥22॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
devi pracaṇḍadordaṇḍadaityadarpavināśini.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..22..
contentBlocks.translation: O Goddess, destroyer of the pride of demons with your powerful arms, grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: देवि (devi) – O Goddess; प्रचण्डदोर्दण्डदैत्यदर्पविनाशिनि (pracaṇḍadordaṇḍadaityadarpavināśini) – destroyer of demon pride (pracaṇḍa:powerful | dordaṇḍa:arms | daitya:demon | darpa:pride | vināśini:destroyer); रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
देवि भक्तजनोद्दामदत्तानन्दोदयेऽम्बिके।
रुपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥23॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
devi bhaktajanoddāmadattānandodaye'mbike.
rupaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi yaśo dehi dviṣo jahi..23..
contentBlocks.translation: O Mother Goddess, giver of great joy to your devotees, grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, and destroy my enemies.
contentBlocks.meanings: देवि (devi) – O Goddess; भक्तजनोद्दामदत्तानन्दोदये (bhaktajanoddāmadattānandodaye) – giver of great joy to devotees (bhakta:devotee | jana:people | uddāma:great | datta:given | ānanda:joy | udaye:giver); अम्बिके (ambike) – O Mother; रुपं (rupaṃ) – beauty; देहि (dehi) – grant; जयं (jayaṃ) – victory; देहि (dehi) – grant; यशो (yaśo) – fame; देहि (dehi) – grant; द्विषो (dviṣo) – enemies; जहि (jahi) – destroy;

contentBlocks.original:
पत्नीं मनोरमां देहि मनोवृत्तानुसारिणीम्।
तारिणीं दुर्गसंसारसागरस्य कुलोद्भवाम्॥24॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
patnīṃ manoramāṃ dehi manovṛttānusāriṇīm.
tāriṇīṃ durgasaṃsārasāgarasya kulodbhavām..24..
contentBlocks.translation: Grant me a delightful wife who follows my heart’s desires, who helps me cross the difficult ocean of worldly existence, and who comes from a noble family.
contentBlocks.meanings: पत्नीं (patnīṃ) – wife; मनोरमां (manoramām) – delightful; देहि (dehi) – grant; मनोवृत्तानुसारिणीम् (manovṛttānusāriṇīm) – follows heart’s desires (manas:mind | vṛtta:behavior | anusāriṇī:following); तारिणीं (tāriṇīm) – helps to cross; दुर्गसंसारसागरस्य (durgasaṃsārasāgarasya) – of the difficult ocean of worldly existence (durga:difficult | saṃsāra:worldly existence | sāgara:ocean); कुलोद्भवाम् (kulodbhavām) – from a noble family (kula:family | udbhavām:originating from);

contentBlocks.original:
इदं स्तोत्रं पठित्वा तु महास्तोत्रं पठेन्नरः।
स तु सप्तशतीसंख्यावरमाप्नोति सम्पदाम्॥25॥
॥ इति देव्या अर्गलास्तोत्रं सम्पूर्णम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
idaṃ stotraṃ paṭhitvā tu mahāstotraṃ paṭhennaraḥ.
sa tu saptaśatīsaṃkhyāvaramāpnoti sampadām..25..
.. iti devyā argalāstotraṃ sampūrṇam ..
contentBlocks.translation: After reciting this stotra, one should also recite the great stotra. He shall obtain the merit of reciting the entire Saptaśatī and attain great prosperity.
contentBlocks.meanings: इदं (idaṃ) – this; स्तोत्रं (stotraṃ) – hymn; पठित्वा (paṭhitvā) – having recited; तु (tu) – but; महास्तोत्रं (mahāstotraṃ) – great hymn (mahā:great | stotraṃ:hymn); पठेत् (paṭhet) – should recite; नरः (naraḥ) – man; स (sa) – he; तु (tu) – but; सप्तशतीसंख्यावरम् (saptaśatīsaṃkhyāvaram) – merit of Saptaśatī count (saptaśatī:Saptaśatī | saṃkhyā:count | varam:merit); आप्नोति (āpnoti) – obtains; सम्पदाम् (sampadām) – of prosperity; इति (iti) – thus; देव्या (devyā) – of the goddess; अर्गलास्तोत्रं (argalāstotraṃ) – Argalā hymn (argalā:Argalā | stotraṃ:hymn); सम्पूर्णम् (sampūrṇam) – complete;
